scope: Major active U.S. Marine Corps bases, air stations, recruit depots, logistics bases, training centers, and standalone support facilities located in the 50 states and Washington, D.C. Includes the Marine Corps component at Joint Base Myer-Henderson Hall. Excludes overseas and territorial installations, Marine Corps Reserve centers, small tenant detachments, ranges, annexes, and subordinate landing fields.
city_method: City is the primary municipality or commonly used postal community associated with the installation headquarters or principal site. Installations spanning multiple municipalities are represented once.
